title:
Contact us
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
We absolutely welcome any feedback, questions, requests for help stewarding your organisation's data.

## Help stewarding your data
If your feedback or questions relate to your organisation's data practices, data stewardship, the Government Chief Data Steward, or any of the guidance content you have found on data.govt.nz, then we suggest that you contact the content team at Stats NZ.
datalead@stats.govt.nz
Stats NZ information services Stats NZ 8 Willis Street PO Box 2922 Wellington 6011 New Zealand

## Help finding data and using the data catalogue
If your feedback or questions relate to the technical aspects of releasing your data on data.govt.nz's open catalogue, then we suggest that you contact the technical support team at the Department of Internal Affiars.
Data.govt.nz Digital Public Service The Department of Internal Affairs - Head Office 45 Pipitea Street Thorndon Wellington New Zealand
Map location (Google maps)
